steps.title: Find the slope of line r
steps.content:
Rewrite the equation in slope-intercept form.
$$
7x-4y=8
$$
$$
-4y=-7x+8
$$
$$
y=\frac{7}{4}x-2
$$

steps.title: Use parallel slopes
steps.content: Parallel lines have the same slope. Since line $r$ has slope $$ \frac{7}{4} $$ line $s$ has the same slope. The answer is D.
